items.question: What is the Batch AI Model Try-On workflow?
items.answer: Batch AI Model Try-On is an AI workflow that generates consistent model try-on images for fashion products at scale. It helps you turn flat product photos into on-model visuals for e-commerce and marketing.

items.question: What inputs do I need for this workflow?
items.answer: You provide product images and simple guidance about your collection, target audience, and desired model/look style. The workflow uses this to guide the generated try-on images.

items.question: Can I generate images for multiple SKUs at once?
items.answer: Yes. The workflow is designed to support batch scenarios so you can generate consistent model try-on images across multiple products or colorways.

items.question: Who should use this workflow?
items.answer: Fashion e-commerce brands, marketplace sellers, merchandising teams, and agencies that need on-model images at scale without traditional studio constraints.

items.question: Can I use the results on product detail pages and ads?
items.answer: Yes. Subject to OpenCreator's terms and underlying model policies, you can use the generated images across product pages, lookbooks, and paid campaigns.
